title: Shashank Shekhar joins JSA as Partner in Bengaluru
description: Former DMD Advocates Partner Shashank Shekhar has joined JSA Advocates & Solicitors as a Retained Partner in Bengaluru. Shekhar is a 2003 graduate of the Campus Law Centre, Faculty of Law, University of Delhi.With over two decades of experience in indirect tax litigation and advisory, Shekhar is a seasoned counsel with extensive experience appearing before the Supreme Court of India, various High Courts, and Customs, Excise and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT).
